arts.ttl: Stoke City transfer latest as wing-back target ticks all the FFP boxes for Potters
arts.sum: It remains unclear whether Stoke have gone as far as making an offer for Andersson, who is valued at around €500k by the website Transfermarkt, but Expressen claim he is ‘on his way out’ of Brommapojkarna. A year later, he returned to Sweden to join Stockholm outfit Brommapojkarna, who finished 10th in the Swedish top-flight last season under former Aston Villa star Olof Mellberg.
